sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37787" key="e)o/rgh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐόργη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n37787.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τορύνη</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.88</biblScope> </bibl> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐέργν</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
